nasb.text: Then Zebul said to him, “Where is your boasting now with which you said, ‘Who is Abimelech that we should serve him?’ Is this not the people whom you despised? Go out now and fight with them!”

esv.text: Then Zebul said to him, “Where is your mouth now, you who said, ‘Who is Abimelech, that we should serve him?’ Are not these the people whom you despised? Go out now and fight with them.”

cnv.text: 西布勒對他說：“你曾經說過：‘亞比米勒是誰，竟要我們服事他呢？’現在你說這話的嘴在哪裡呢？這不是你輕視的人嗎？現在請你出去與他們交戰吧。”

ccb.text: 西布勒说：“你的豪气哪里去了？你曾说，‘亚比米勒是谁，我们竟要服侍他？’这些不就是你讥笑的人吗？出去迎战吧！”
